details.test: Task 1 - Select base plan under $20/month with annual billing and open checkout
Task 2 - Add sports add-on under $10 with 5+ HD sports channels and confirm
Task 3 - Favorite 3 channels via filters and verify Favorites list
Task 4 - Configure parental controls with PIN 1234, TV-14 limit, and purchase blocking
Task 5 - Compare plans under $30 and switch to one with more simultaneous streams
Task 6 - Schedule sports recording next Friday at 8:00 PM and keep for 7 days
Task 7 - Switch to annual billing, apply SAVE20, choose plan under $200/year, and update
Task 8 - Find 4K nature documentary series and play first episode
